nodes.label: AI as advanced search tool for niche information
nodes.grounding_span: I use it like an advanced version of a Google search, to find bits of information that may take longer to source personally

nodes.label: AI reliability in summarization
nodes.label_negative: AI errors in summarization (insertions, misinterpretations, omissions)
nodes.grounding_span: I've caught it making errors a few times

nodes.label: AI as cognitive labor-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: path of least resistance to allow an AI to do the boring cognitive leg work

nodes.label: AI writing authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: AI writing has a distinct voice that most people can detect

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace culture
nodes.grounding_span: I am the only person at my workplace who is aware of AI

nodes.label: AI impact on competitive landscape
nodes.label_negative: Company failure due to competitors' AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: our competitors have become unbeatable using new AI tricks

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: saved a lot of unnecessary debate and chin scratching

nodes.label: Accuracy and trustworthiness
nodes.grounding_span: I don't always trust it to do so accurately

nodes.label: Professional reputation and client relationships
nodes.grounding_span: potential to offend a client sending an AI written text

nodes.label: Personal skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: maintaining my skills in areas where AI could potentially take over

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for niche research
nodes.grounding_span: Without AI we probably wouldn't have figured it out

nodes.label: Frustration with AI summarization errors
nodes.grounding_span: it can sometimes insert information that does not belong, misinterpret things, or leave out something I considered important

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as first pass
nodes.grounding_span: I rely on AI to summarize large texts more often than I should since I am aware these errors can slip in

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I still wouldn't trust it to write a letter of quotation to one of our clients

nodes.label: Optimistic anticipation of future AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that as AI develops I can incorporate it more into my work

nodes.label: Pragmatic cost-benefit reasoning — weighing effort saved against verification cost
nodes.grounding_span: path of least resistance to allow an AI to do the boring cognitive leg work and then fine tune it afterwards

nodes.label: Strategic foresight — monitoring technology for future opportunities
nodes.grounding_span: I plan to monitor it and take any opportunities it offers me
